import org.slf4j.Logger;

// Tier-1 positive: a receiver whose declared type resolves to org.slf4j.Logger
// (via explicit import or a fully-qualified declaration) captures at error/warn
// with the caught in the arguments. The variable name never participates.
class Slf4jCapture {
    private final Logger log;
    private final org.slf4j.Logger fq;
    private final Logger WHATEVER;

    Slf4jCapture(Logger log) {
        this.log = log;
        this.fq = log;
        this.WHATEVER = log;
    }

    void viaImport() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void viaFullyQualifiedDecl() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            fq.error("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void warnCapturesRegardlessOfName() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            WHATEVER.warn("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
